log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Tortle — Bardic Musician.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Tortle — Bardic Musician.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:11+3=14 vs AC 18] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Tortle — Bardic Musician.
→ Tortle — Bardic Musician: DEX save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Tortle — Bardic Musician.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Tortle — Bardic Musician.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:13+3=16 vs AC 18] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Tortle — Bardic Musician.
→ Tortle — Bardic Musician: DEX save [d20:10+6=16 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tortle — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Tortle — Bardic Musician --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 18

→ Mage: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 5/5 targets affected.
